query:
SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.chaveJ, a.cargo, u.id as userId, u.role 
FROM agentes a 
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.name = a.nome OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(a.chaveJ), '%')
WHERE a.cargo LIKE '%CEO%' OR a.cargo LIKE '%ceo%';
